scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate --workspace=backend && npm run db:seed --workspace=backend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold" "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
